objects.prompt: VIEW TOP DOWN 2D "Pixel art game asset pack, 48x48 grid spritesheet. Theme: Modern urban city life. Include a variety of high-detail props: a sleek vending machine with glowing buttons, a metallic ATM terminal, a large dumpster with trash bags, a complex rooftop HVAC unit, a set of stacked shipping crates, and an industrial electrical transformer box. Style: 90s anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, bold dark outlines, vibrant urban color palette with hints of neon. Perspective: Top-down with slight isometric slant to show volume. Isolated on a white background. Each prop must feel solid, weighty, and vertically oriented to add depth to the game map."
